docs.title: RIMS Schemes
docs.text:
Please click on an element in the periodic table below to see the corresponding RIMS scheme. If an element is not linked, no scheme is currently available.

If you would like to contribute a scheme, please see here.

H He Li Be B C N O F Ne Na Mg Al Si P S Cl Ar K Ca Sc Ti V Cr Mn Fe Co Ni Cu Zn Ga Ge As Se Br Kr Rb Sr Y Zr Nb Mo Tc Ru Rh Pd Ag Cd In Sn Sb Te I Xe Cs Ba * Hf Ta W Re Os Ir Pt Au Hg Tl Pb Bi Po At Rn Fr Ra ** Rf Db Sg Bh Hs Mt Ds Rg Cn Nh Fl Mc Lv Ts Og * La Ce Pr Nd Pm Sm Eu Gd Tb Dy Ho Er Tm Yb Lu ** Ac Th Pa U Np Pu Am Cm Bk Cf Es Fm Md No Lr

docs.text:
• Symbol: W
  • Series: TransitionMetal

  • Atomic weight: 183.840 u
  • Ionization potential: 63427.700 1/cm
  • Melting point: 3695.2 K
  • Boiling point: 5828.1 K
